quality_bar: THE best amulets in the game — masterpiece tier. Not a simple accessory swap.
rules: Helper FACE/HEAD must be instantly recognizable (Pío duck face, Ivan teddy face, etc.)
Body can be WILD HYBRID: snake, kraken, golem, celestial beast — full creative freedom
Layer multiple insane ideas — each anomaly UNIQUE, never repeat the same hybrid formula between helpers
Example hybrids are inspiration only (serpent was ONE idea for Pío, not a template for Ivan/Coco/etc.)
Hilarious and shareable, never gore — premium 3D plush museum render
Must feel 10× more epic than Super Legendary — the pull of a lifetime

helpers.prompt: MASTERPIECE ultra-premium 3D plush ANOMALY same epic scale as other anomalies. Iconic Pío yellow duck HEAD recognizable. Colossal triple-coiled serpent-dragon body: quilted golden scales with glowing cyan soup-rune symbols, orange belly, flame-fin spine, bioluminescent bubbles, chef toque with tiny crown, skull-chef gold medallion, steaming mini cauldron, golden ladle in beak, pearl tail tips, duck wings on neck, museum render, white background
